<Task/>
<Group autoexecute="true" hide-input="false" labelreference="L2" drawlabel="true" applyint="true" applyrational="true" applyexponent="false"><Text-field prompt="&gt; " style="Maple Input" layout="Normal"><Font encoding="UTF-8">restart; 
with(numtheory):

# \320\222\321\213\320\261\320\265\321\200\320\270\321\202\320\265 \321\200\320\265\320\266\320\270\320\274: true \320\264\320\273\321\217 \320\276\321\202\320\272\321\200\321\213\321\202\321\213\321\205 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207\320\265\320\271 (RSA), false \320\264\320\273\321\217 \320\267\320\260\320\272\321\200\321\213\321\202\321\213\321\205 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207\320\265\320\271 (\321\201\320\270\320\274\320\274\320\265\321\202\321\200\320\270\321\207\320\275\320\276\320\265 \321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\320\265)
usePublicKey := false;  # \320\230\320\267\320\274\320\265\320\275\320\270\321\202\320\265 \320\275\320\260 false \320\264\320\273\321\217 \321\201\320\270\320\274\320\274\320\265\321\202\321\200\320\270\321\207\320\275\320\276\320\263\320\276 \321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\321\217

# \320\223\320\273\320\276\320\261\320\260\320\273\321\214\320\275\321\213\320\265 \320\277\320\260\321\200\320\260\320\274\320\265\321\202\321\200\321\213
global_r := 100000;  # \320\234\320\276\320\264\321\203\320\273\321\214 \320\264\320\273\321\217 \321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\321\217

# \320\237\321\200\320\270\320\274\320\265\321\200 \321\201\320\270\320\274\320\274\320\265\321\202\321\200\320\270\321\207\320\275\320\276\320\263\320\276 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207\320\260
local symmetricKey := 12345;  # \320\237\321\200\320\270\320\274\320\265\321\200 \321\201\320\270\320\274\320\274\320\265\321\202\321\200\320\270\321\207\320\275\320\276\320\263\320\276 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207\320\260
m := 50000;  # \320\237\321\200\320\270\320\274\320\265\321\200 \321\201\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\321\217, \320\272\320\276\321\202\320\276\321\200\320\276\320\265 \320\274\320\265\320\275\321\214\321\210\320\265 global_r

# \320\244\321\203\320\275\320\272\321\206\320\270\321\217 \320\264\320\273\321\217 \320\263\320\265\320\275\320\265\321\200\320\260\321\206\320\270\320\270 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207\320\265\320\271 RSA
generateRSAKeys := proc()
    local p1, p2, a, b, found, local_r;
    
    # \320\223\320\265\320\275\320\265\321\200\320\260\321\206\320\270\321\217 \320\277\321\200\320\276\321\201\321\202\321\213\321\205 \321\207\320\270\321\201\320\265\320\273 \320\264\320\273\321\217 RSA
    p1 := nextprime(RandomTools[Generate](integer(range=3..10^18)));
    p2 := nextprime(RandomTools[Generate](integer(range=3..10^18)));
    
    while p2 = p1 do  # \320\243\320\261\320\265\320\264\320\270\321\202\320\265\321\201\321\214, \321\207\321\202\320\276 \320\277\321\200\320\276\321\201\321\202\321\213\320\265 \321\207\320\270\321\201\320\273\320\260 \321\200\320\260\320\267\320\275\321\213\320\265
        p2 := nextprime(RandomTools[Generate](integer(range=3..10^18)));
    end do;

    local_r := p1 * p2;  # \320\233\320\276\320\272\320\260\320\273\321\214\320\275\321\213\320\271 \320\274\320\276\320\264\321\203\320\273\321\214 \320\264\320\273\321\217 RSA

    # \320\222\321\213\320\261\320\276\321\200 \321\201\320\273\321\203\321\207\320\260\320\271\320\275\320\276\320\263\320\276 \320\276\321\202\320\272\321\200\321\213\321\202\320\276\320\263\320\276 \321\215\320\272\321\201\320\277\320\276\320\275\320\265\320\275\321\202\320\260
    found := false;  # \320\244\320\273\320\260\320\263, \321\203\320\272\320\260\320\267\321\213\320\262\320\260\321\216\321\211\320\270\320\271, \320\275\320\260\320\271\320\264\320\265\320\275 \320\273\320\270 \320\264\320\265\320\271\321\201\321\202\320\262\320\270\321\202\320\265\320\273\321\214\320\275\321\213\320\271 \321\215\320\272\321\201\320\277\320\276\320\275\320\265\320\275\321\202
    while not found do
        a := RandomTools[Generate](integer(range=2..100000));  # \320\223\320\265\320\275\320\265\321\200\320\260\321\206\320\270\321\217 \321\201\320\273\321\203\321\207\320\260\320\271\320\275\320\276\320\263\320\276 \321\207\320\270\321\201\320\273\320\260
        if igcd(a, phi(local_r)) = 1 then  # \320\237\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\265\321\200\320\272\320\260, \321\217\320\262\320\273\321\217\320\265\321\202\321\201\321\217 \320\273\320\270 \320\276\320\275\320\276 \320\262\320\267\320\260\320\270\320\274\320\275\320\276 \320\277\321\200\320\276\321\201\321\202\321\213\320\274 \321\201 phi(local_r)
            found := true;  # \320\224\320\265\320\271\321\201\321\202\320\262\320\270\321\202\320\265\320\273\321\214\320\275\321\213\320\271 \321\215\320\272\321\201\320\277\320\276\320\275\320\265\320\275\321\202 \320\275\320\260\320\271\320\264\320\265\320\275
        end if;
    end do;

    # \320\237\320\276\320\270\321\201\320\272 \320\267\320\260\320\272\321\200\321\213\321\202\320\276\320\263\320\276 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207\320\260
    igcdex(a, phi(local_r), 'x', 'y');            
    b := 1 * x mod phi(local_r);  # \320\227\320\260\320\272\321\200\321\213\321\202\321\213\320\271 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207

    return local_r, a, b;  # \320\222\320\276\320\267\320\262\321\200\320\260\321\211\320\260\320\265\320\274 \320\274\320\276\320\264\321\203\320\273\321\214, \320\276\321\202\320\272\321\200\321\213\321\202\321\213\320\271 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207 \320\270 \320\267\320\260\320\272\321\200\321\213\321\202\321\213\320\271 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207
end proc;

# \320\244\321\203\320\275\320\272\321\206\320\270\321\217 \320\264\320\273\321\217 \321\201\320\270\320\274\320\274\320\265\321\202\321\200\320\270\321\207\320\275\320\276\320\263\320\276 \321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\321\217
symmetricEncrypt := proc(message, key)
    return (message + key) mod global_r;  # \320\237\321\200\320\276\321\201\321\202\320\276\320\265 \321\201\320\273\320\276\320\266\320\265\320\275\320\270\320\265 \320\264\320\273\321\217 \321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\321\217
end proc;

symmetricDecrypt := proc(encryptedMessage, key)
    return (encryptedMessage - key + global_r) mod global_r;  # \320\237\321\200\320\276\321\201\321\202\320\276\320\265 \320\262\321\213\321\207\320\270\321\202\320\260\320\275\320\270\320\265 \320\264\320\273\321\217 \321\200\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\272\320\270
end proc;

# \320\236\321\201\320\275\320\276\320\262\320\275\320\276\320\265 \320\262\321\213\320\277\320\276\320\273\320\275\320\265\320\275\320\270\320\265
local r, a, b, m, encryptedMessage, decryptedMessage;

if usePublicKey then
    # \320\223\320\265\320\275\320\265\321\200\320\260\321\206\320\270\321\217 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207\320\265\320\271 RSA
    r, a, b := generateRSAKeys();
    
    # \320\237\321\200\320\270\320\274\320\265\321\200 \321\201\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\321\217
    m := 10038042132;  # m &lt; r
    if m &gt;= r then
        error &quot;\320\241\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\320\265 \320\264\320\276\320\273\320\266\320\275\320\276 \320\261\321\213\321\202\321\214 \320\274\320\265\320\275\321\214\321\210\320\265 \320\274\320\276\320\264\321\203\320\273\321\217 r.&quot;;
    end if;

    # \320\250\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\320\265 \321\201\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\321\217 \321\201 \320\270\321\201\320\277\320\276\320\273\321\214\320\267\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\320\265\320\274 RSA
    encryptedMessage := m &amp;^ a mod r;  # \320\250\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\320\265
    printf(&quot;\320\241\320\270\321\201\321\202\320\265\320\274\320\260 \321\201 \320\276\321\202\320\272\321\200\321\213\321\202\321\213\320\274\320\270 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207\320\260\320\274\320\270:\134n\320\227\320\260\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\276: %d\134n&quot;, encryptedMessage);

    # \320\240\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\272\320\260 \321\201\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\321\217 \321\201 \320\270\321\201\320\277\320\276\320\273\321\214\320\267\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\320\265\320\274 RSA
    decryptedMessage := encryptedMessage &amp;^ b mod r;  # \320\240\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\272\320\260
    printf(&quot;\320\240\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\276: %d\134n&quot;, decryptedMessage);

else
    # \320\237\321\200\320\270\320\274\320\265\321\200 \321\201\320\270\320\274\320\274\320\265\321\202\321\200\320\270\321\207\320\275\320\276\320\263\320\276 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207\320\260
    local symmetricKey := 12345;  # \320\237\321\200\320\270\320\274\320\265\321\200 \321\201\320\270\320\274\320\274\320\265\321\202\321\200\320\270\321\207\320\275\320\276\320\263\320\276 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207\320\260
    m := 10038042132;  # \320\237\321\200\320\270\320\274\320\265\321\200 \321\201\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\321\217

    # \320\250\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\320\265 \321\201\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\321\217 \321\201 \320\270\321\201\320\277\320\276\320\273\321\214\320\267\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\320\265\320\274 \321\201\320\270\320\274\320\274\320\265\321\202\321\200\320\270\321\207\320\275\320\276\320\263\320\276 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207\320\260
encryptedMessage := symmetricEncrypt(m, symmetricKey);
printf(&quot;\320\241\320\270\321\201\321\202\320\265\320\274\320\260 \321\201 \321\201\320\270\320\274\320\274\320\265\321\202\321\200\320\270\321\207\320\275\321\213\320\274 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207\320\276\320\274:\134n\320\227\320\260\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\276: %d\134n&quot;, encryptedMessage);

# \320\240\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\272\320\260 \321\201\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\321\217 \321\201 \320\270\321\201\320\277\320\276\320\273\321\214\320\267\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\320\265\320\274 \321\201\320\270\320\274\320\274\320\265\321\202\321\200\320\270\321\207\320\275\320\276\320\263\320\276 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207\320\260
decryptedMessage := symmetricDecrypt(encryptedMessage, symmetricKey);
printf(&quot;\320\240\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\276: %d\134n&quot;, decryptedMessage);
end if;

# \320\237\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\265\321\200\320\272\320\260 \320\272\320\276\321\200\321\200\320\265\320\272\321\202\320\275\320\276\321\201\321\202\320\270
if usePublicKey then
    if m = decryptedMessage then
        printf(&quot;\320\240\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\272\320\260 \321\203\321\201\320\277\320\265\321\210\320\275\320\260: \320\276\321\200\320\270\320\263\320\270\320\275\320\260\320\273\321\214\320\275\320\276\320\265 \321\201\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\320\265 \321\201\320\276\320\262\320\277\320\260\320\264\320\260\320\265\321\202 \321\201 \321\200\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\275\321\213\320\274.\134n&quot;);
    else
        printf(&quot;\320\236\321\210\320\270\320\261\320\272\320\260 \321\200\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\272\320\270: \320\276\321\200\320\270\320\263\320\270\320\275\320\260\320\273\321\214\320\275\320\276\320\265 \321\201\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\320\265 \320\275\320\265 \321\201\320\276\320\262\320\277\320\260\320\264\320\260\320\265\321\202 \321\201 \321\200\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\275\321\213\320\274.\134n&quot;);
    end if;
else
    if m = decryptedMessage then
    printf(&quot;\320\240\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\272\320\260 \321\203\321\201\320\277\320\265\321\210\320\275\320\260: \320\276\321\200\320\270\320\263\320\270\320\275\320\260\320\273\321\214\320\275\320\276\320\265 \321\201\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\320\265 \321\201\320\276\320\262\320\277\320\260\320\264\320\260\320\265\321\202 \321\201 \321\200\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\275\321\213\320\274.\134n&quot;);
else
    printf(&quot;\320\236\321\210\320\270\320\261\320\272\320\260 \321\200\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\272\320\270: \320\276\321\200\320\270\320\263\320\270\320\275\320\260\320\273\321\214\320\275\320\276\320\265 \321\201\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\320\265 \320\275\320\265 \321\201\320\276\320\262\320\277\320\260\320\264\320\260\320\265\321\202 \321\201 \321\200\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\275\321\213\320\274.\134n&quot;);
end if;
end if;
</Font></Text-field>

</Output>

<Output><Text-field style="2D Output" layout="Maple Output"><Equation executable="false" style="2D Output" display="">LV9JLFR5cGVzZXR0aW5nRzYkJSpwcm90ZWN0ZWRHSShfc3lzbGliRzYiSSxtcHJpbnRzbGFzaEdGKDYkNyM+STFzeW1tZXRyaWNFbmNyeXB0R0YoZio2JEkobWVzc2FnZUdGKEkka2V5R0YoRihGKEYoTy1JJG1vZEdGKDYkLCY5JCIiIjklRjhJKWdsb2JhbF9yR0YoRihGKEYoNyNGLg==</Equation></Text-field>
</Output>

</Output>
<Output><Text-field style="HyperlinkWarning" layout="HyperlinkWarning"><Hyperlink linktarget="http://www.maplesoft.com/support/help/errors/view.aspx?path=Warning,%20A%20new%20binding%20for%20the%20name%20%60m%60%20has%20been%20created.%20The%20global%20instance%20of%20this%20name%20is%20still%20accessible%20using%20the%20%3A-%20prefix,%20%3A-%60m%60.%20%20See%20%3Fprotect%20for%20details." hyperlink="true"><Font style="HyperlinkWarning">Warning, A new binding for the name `m` has been created. The global instance of this name is still accessible using the :- prefix, :-`m`.  See ?protect for details.</Font></Hyperlink></Text-field>
</Output>
<Output><Text-field style="2D Output" layout="Maple Output"><Equation executable="false" style="2D Output" display="LUkjbWlHNiMvSSttb2R1bGVuYW1lRzYiSSxUeXBlc2V0dGluZ0dJKF9zeXNsaWJHRic2JVExZGVjcnlwdGVkTWVzc2FnZUYnLyUnaXRhbGljR1EldHJ1ZUYnLyUsbWF0aHZhcmlhbnRHUSdpdGFsaWNGJw==">STFkZWNyeXB0ZWRNZXNzYWdlRzYkSSdfbG9jYWxHJSpwcm90ZWN0ZWRHL0YkSTBfbjI0NTA5OTM2OTgwNjRHNiI=</Equation></Text-field>
</Output>
<Output><Text-field style="HyperlinkWarning" layout="HyperlinkWarning"><Hyperlink linktarget="http://www.maplesoft.com/support/help/errors/view.aspx?path=Warning,%20embedded%20local%20declaration%20of%20name%20%60symmetricKey%60%20ignored%20outside%20procedure%20or%20module" hyperlink="true"><Font style="HyperlinkWarning">Warning, embedded local declaration of name `symmetricKey` ignored outside procedure or module</Font></Hyperlink></Text-field>
</Output>
<Output><Text-field style="2D Output" layout="Maple Output"><Equation executable="false" style="2D Output" display="">LV9JLFR5cGVzZXR0aW5nRzYkJSpwcm90ZWN0ZWRHSShfc3lzbGliRzYiSSxtcHJpbnRzbGFzaEdGKDYkNyM+SS1zeW1tZXRyaWNLZXlHNiRJJ19sb2NhbEdGJi9GL0kwX24yNDUwOTk0MDY0NzUyR0YoIiZYQiI3I0Yy</Equation></Text-field>
</Output>
<Output><Text-field style="2D Output" layout="Maple Output"><Equation executable="false" style="2D Output" display="">LV9JLFR5cGVzZXR0aW5nRzYkJSpwcm90ZWN0ZWRHSShfc3lzbGliRzYiSSxtcHJpbnRzbGFzaEdGKDYkNyM+SSJtRzYkSSdfbG9jYWxHRiYvRi9JMF9uMjQ1MDk5MzU4NDUxMkdGKCIsS0AvUSsiNyNGMg==</Equation></Text-field>
</Output>
<Output><Text-field style="2D Output" layout="Maple Output"><Equation executable="false" style="2D Output" display="">LV9JLFR5cGVzZXR0aW5nRzYkJSpwcm90ZWN0ZWRHSShfc3lzbGliRzYiSSxtcHJpbnRzbGFzaEdGKDYkNyM+STFlbmNyeXB0ZWRNZXNzYWdlRzYkSSdfbG9jYWxHRiYvRi9JMF9uMjQ1MDk5MzY5ODAxNkdGKCImeFcmNyNGMg==</Equation></Text-field>
</Output>
<Output><Text-field style="Line Printed Output" layout="Line Printed Output"><Font encoding="UTF-8">\320\241\320\270\321\201\321\202\320\265\320\274\320\260 \321\201 \321\201\320\270\320\274\320\274\320\265\321\202\321\200\320\270\321\207\320\275\321\213\320\274 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207\320\276\320\274:
\320\227\320\260\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\276: 54477
</Font></Text-field>
</Output>
<Output><Text-field style="2D Output" layout="Maple Output"><Equation executable="false" style="2D Output" display="">LV9JLFR5cGVzZXR0aW5nRzYkJSpwcm90ZWN0ZWRHSShfc3lzbGliRzYiSSxtcHJpbnRzbGFzaEdGKDYkNyM+STFkZWNyeXB0ZWRNZXNzYWdlRzYkSSdfbG9jYWxHRiYvRi9JMF9uMjQ1MDk5MzY5ODA2NEdGKCImS0AlNyNGMg==</Equation></Text-field>
</Output>
<Output><Text-field style="Line Printed Output" layout="Line Printed Output"><Font encoding="UTF-8">\320\240\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\276: 42132
\320\236\321\210\320\270\320\261\320\272\320\260 \321\200\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\272\320\270: \320\276\321\200\320\270\320\263\320\270\320\275\320\260\320\273\321\214\320\275\320\276\320\265 \321\201\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\320\265 \320\275\320\265 \321\201\320\276\320\262\320\277\320\260\320\264\320\260\320\265\321\202 \321\201 \321\200\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\275\321\213\320\274.
</Font></Text-field>
</Output>
</Group>
